channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pedal bin, 25th May
item.description:
A black square pedal being has been dumped on the pavement for several weeks in Mera Drive. This is on the opposite side of the road as you drive up the slip road. Please arrange collection
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mera Drive, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike on street, 25th May
item.description:
X

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fortune Green Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 25th May
item.description:
Constant problem. Please hold people responsible our streets are a total mess. I litter pick twice a week. I’ve had enough of living in trash. The smell is gross in summer too. Very unhygienic we have kids out on these paths.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evering Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 25th May
item.description:
Old suitcase and other household rubbish dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mitchell Close, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant over flowing bin, 25th May
item.description:
This bin is always overflowing on the weekend. It is unsightly and unhygienic. These three photos taken over last 3 Saturdays. It looks worse today.Either get it cleaned more regularly or hold the shop and cafe on that corner responsible please.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evering Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin over flowing, 25th May
item.description:
Rubbish in street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lugard Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Staying on red for ages, 25th May
item.description:
Suddenly today these traffic lights have changed to stay on red for ages and only go green for about 3 seconds. This is causing a huge back up of traffic on the road including massive delays for busses. The amount of pollution has increased due to a dramatic increase in idling cars, please revert to the previous timing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackwall Lane, East Greenwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Kilburn Station - Fly-Posts

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Exeter Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Exeter Road, London

item.title: Large fridge dumped, 25th May
item.description:
Large fridge dumped. At the Trafalgar Road end of Earlswood Street. It's an area where there is always rubbish. I guess because nothing is enforced then they think they can get away with it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trafalgar Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continual overflowing bins and rubbish, 25th May
item.description:
Continual overflowing bins and flytipping from residents. Plastic recycling bins have household bin bags

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Groombridge Close, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Growing quantity of household and building rubbish now blocking the pavement, 25th May
item.description:
Rubbish is dumped here almost every day

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alkham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A line of about five potholes getting larger every day, 25th May
item.description:
These potholes are causing cars to swerve into the oncoming traffic in the opposite lane. They are after the dip in a big hill and cars routinely get up to 40mph at this point (despite 30mph lot).. cyclist also cone down the hill fast and the encounter these potholes and have to brake or swerve. They are between two schools, one on either side of the road. It's a serious accident waiting to happen.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hermitage Road, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Subsidence on Avenue Road, Erith on the Beechfield road roundabout, 25th May
item.description:
This appeared today after recent Thames water works.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avenue Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Matress ans bed dumped, 25th May
item.description:
On Crescent Road. Looks like matress was set on fire

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crescent Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox inside 3 heavy duty black bags, 25th May
item.description:
Dead fox wrapped inside 3 heavy duty black bags has been left at the location. It appears to have been there for a couple days. Please could this be removed as soon as possible due to hygiene and smell concerns.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Shorne Close, St Mary Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 53 victoria road, 25th May
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag
